title: Ted Abel appointed president and provost distinguished fellow
summary_en: Ted Abel, professor and chair of the Department of Neuroscience and Pharmacology in the University of Iowa Carver College of Medicine and the Roy J. Carver Director of the Iowa Neuroscience Institute, has been appointed the university’s first president and provost distinguished fellow.
title_cn: 特德·埃布尔获任校长暨教务长杰出研究员

title: UI professor, poet Paige Lewis talks about the books they love (and the dogs that chew them)
title_cn: 爱荷华大学教授、诗人佩奇·刘易斯畅谈其所喜爱的书籍（以及啃咬这些书籍的犬只）

title: UI to plant second Miyawaki Forest on Arbor Day
summary_en: After successfully planting its first Miyawaki forest in 2025, the University of Iowa will plant a second native woodland, Miyawaki 2.0, on Arbor Day 2026.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学将于植树节栽种第二片宫胁林

title: 8 scholars with Iowa ties named Guggenheim Fellows
summary_en: Eight University of Iowa–affiliated scholars are among those selected for 2026 Guggenheim Fellowships. The fellows are recognized for their prior career achievement and exceptional promise.
title_cn: 8名与艾奥瓦州有关联的学者获评古根海姆学者

title: Discover Your University returns with 2 spring dates
title_cn: “发现你的大学”活动回归，春季设两个举办日期

title: UI professor using data to better understand teen mental health
title_cn: 爱荷华大学教授运用数据深化青少年心理健康研究

title: UI professor's research examines task switching in space
title_cn: 艾奥瓦大学教授的研究考察太空环境下的任务切换问题
